materialization_window.warning_metadata: 2019 ACCEPTED_WITH_WARNINGS and 2026 partial-year warning metadata preserved through DatasetVersion state

path_label_definitions.parameter_source: existing governed path-family definitions plus FUTSUB-P05 batch plan; no parameter sweep or tuning

mae.definition: maximum adverse excursion over the guarded forward real-trade-bar window
mae.label_available_ts: window end / effective guarded terminal availability

mfe.definition: maximum favorable excursion over the guarded forward real-trade-bar window
mfe.label_available_ts: window end / effective guarded terminal availability

target_before_stop.definition: boolean target-before-stop path outcome using governed target_return and stop_return
target_before_stop.label_available_ts: first target/stop touch availability; if no touch, guarded window end availability

triple_barrier.definition: upper/lower/time barrier outcome encoded as target=1, stop=-1, horizon=0, ambiguous=null
triple_barrier.label_available_ts: first target/stop touch availability; if no touch, guarded window end availability
